150.label: Lv. 150 reward

drone.name: Drone
drone.description: Fast melee drone that charges the player.

sentinel.name: Sentinel
sentinel.description: Ranged sentinel that shoots at the player.

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.description: Fast and aggressive melee unit. Charges the player relentlessly.

sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.description: Stationary ranged unit with high damage and long sight range. Slow fire rate.

swarm_drone.name: Swarm Drone
swarm_drone.description: Tiny fast drone. Low HP but appears in swarms. Hard to hit.

turret.name: Auto-Turret
turret.description: Stationary automated turret. High HP, fast fire rate, limited range. Defends high-value zones.

heavy_gunner.name: Heavy Gunner
heavy_gunner.description: Heavily armored ranged unit. Slow but extremely dangerous sustained fire.

supply.label: Supply Crate
supply.description: Common field supplies - mostly white and green gear.

tactical.label: Tactical Crate
tactical.description: Military-grade equipment - blue to purple quality.

elite.label: Elite Crate
elite.description: High-value cache - purple, gold, and rare red items.

first_blood.name: First Blood
first_blood.description: Eliminate your first enemy operator in a raid.

lucky_crate.name: Lucky Crate
lucky_crate.description: Open a High Value Crate dropped by an AI enemy.

survivor.name: Survivor
survivor.description: Extract from a Chaos difficulty raid.

welcome.name: Welcome, Operator
welcome.description: Begin your journey as an operator. Unlocked automatically on first login.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Game developer. Enhanced loot drop rates and exclusive perks.
